title: phyllanthus cyrtophyllus
intro: Phyllanthus cyrtophyllus is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the small-leaf Phyllanthus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Phyllanthus cyrtophyllus have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating liver and kidney disorders, and aiding in digestion. Phyllanthus cyrtophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine as a powder or extract.
